S

setLevel(int) - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.model.IWord
Sets the current level and reloads words accordingly.
setLevel(int) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.WordModel
Sets the level.
setOnTick(Runnable) - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.model.ITimer
Sets a Runnable to be executed at each tick of the timer.
setOnTick(Runnable) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.TimerModel
Sets action on each tick.
setOnTimeEnd(Runnable) - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.model.ITimer
Sets a Runnable to be executed when the timer ends.
setOnTimeEnd(Runnable) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.TimerModel
Sets action when time ends.
setResults(GameModel) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.FinalController
Displays the final results of the player.
showCorrectMessage() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Displays a correct answer animation.
showIncorrectMessage() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Displays an incorrect answer animation.
showLevelUpMessage(Runnable) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Displays a level-up animation.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.Main
Starts the JavaFX application.
startTimer() - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.model.ITimer
Starts the timer countdown.
startTimer() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.TimerModel
Starts the timer.
stop() - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.model.ITimer
Stops the timer.
stop() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.TimerModel
Stops the timer.
